name: Koko
description: Koko — crisis detection and intervention API for self-harm, suicide, and eating-disorder signals.

seo.title: Koko — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Koko: Koko — crisis detection and intervention API for self-harm, suicide, and eating-disorder signals.

when_to_use: Building empathy-focused mental health support tools with AI
Detecting user distress signals in text for crisis intervention
Integrating peer support features with AI-assisted response routing
Running content safety checks for mental health platform moderation

pros: Only major API focused on crisis intervention
Detects self-harm, suicide, and ED signals
Offers response playbooks, not just detection
cons: Very narrow scope, not general moderation
Ethical concerns around past AI-experiment controversy
review.verdict: Specialist layer for platforms with mental-health exposure; pair with a general moderation vendor.
review.best_for: Teen apps, mental health platforms, and communities needing crisis signal detection.
review.not_for: General moderation use cases or teams uncomfortable with sensitive domain risk.
